current_sprint.name: GUI Runtime Truth Update
added: Settings modal contains P1 runtime/env/security fields
static demo counters are overwritten by runtime-truth where available

recent_changes: v30.22: HUD GUI now exposes Runtime Truth for P1 store, embeddings, gates, golden quality, migration and security status.
v30.21: Unified application bootstrap makes python launcher.py start Jarvis directly.
v30.20: GUI startup commands and Windows scripts were unified around the launcher.
v30.19: P1 GUI runtime surfaces were updated.
v30.18: Vector audit uses full index identity and p1-vector-index-repair fixes provider/model/dimension drift through reindex.
v30.17: Vectors are keyed by provider:model:dimension to prevent silent model-migration drift.
v30.16: OpenAI embeddings can use native HTTPS transport without falling back to fake local vectors.
release_notes: Current operating source of truth: README.md, INSTALLATION_BEGINNER.md, docs/README.md, docs/START_GUI.md.
Historical release artifacts remain under docs/releases/.
Production readiness remains blocked without live provider credentials, pgvector validation, real connectors and secure secret storage.
open_blockers: live OpenAI/Ollama provider health against real credentials/endpoints
production semantic embedding provider live credentials/endpoints
productive connector runtime with OAuth/API sync
next_release: Service lifecycle, full local release validation, live provider gate, pgvector production path, then connector runtime validation
